# reg-push3 API

> reg-push3 api · @ai-native-solutions · HTTP API (Docker-ready) · MIT-licensed · Ed25519-signed · listed on FallMarket.

reg-push3 API is a sovereign tool built by the AI-Native Solutions guild. It runs on your machine, ships with source, and never phones home.

## Canonical URL

https://sjgant80-hub.github.io/reg-push3-api/

## Category

HTTP API (Docker-ready). Part of the FallMarket sovereign agent marketplace (https://sjgant80-hub.github.io/fallmarket/).

## Install

```
npm install @ai-native-solutions/reg-push3-api
```

## About AI-Native Solutions

AI-Native Solutions builds sovereign single-file AI tools, MCP servers, SDKs, and HTTP APIs. All work is MIT, all is Ed25519-signed, all is discoverable via FallMarket. This tool is one entry in a 766-listing catalog.
